CustomField.description: The MR calculation will be performed based on the selected method. Select MAX to use the maximum of the Supplemental Rent Rates. Select SUM to use the sum of all the Supplemental Rent Rates. Select N/A if no multiple rates are involved. Note: If multiple rates are set up for the N/A method, then the latest rate will be considered for the MR calculation.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The MR calculation will be performed based on the selected method. Select MAX to use the maximum of the Supplemental Rent Rates. Select SUM to use the sum of all the Supplemental Rent Rates. Select N/A if no multiple rates are involved.
CustomField.label: MR Rate Method
